title: Pilot AI taps algorithms to extract info from sales calls | Y Combinator
full_text:
Salespeople can spend nearly 25% of their day writing up notes and updating customer relationship management (CRM) software — time they could be spending closing deals.
Salespeople can spend nearly 25% of their day writing up notes and updating customer relationship management (CRM) software — time they could be spending closing deals.
Pilot AI (YC S22) frees up all of this wasted time by using AI to analyze sales calls and transfer that information directly into their CRMs, automatically.
Pilot's founder, Maxwell Lu, knows this pain point firsthand — as a former product engineer at Salesforce and the head of revenue operations at a previous startup, he found himself frustrated by the task of re-listening to sales calls to write up notes and fill out CRMs. Searching for a better way, he decided to build a solution with Pilot AI.
Pilot AI taps algorithms to extract info from sales calls | TechCrunch
